gameplayContract.input: mirakana::VirtualInput deterministic right-key camera/controller movement over the cooked primary camera node
gameplayContract.scene: GameEngine.Scene.v1 loaded from a cooked package with static mesh, primary perspective camera, and directional light metadata
gameplayContract.sceneRenderer: mirakana::submit_scene_render_packet with material instance intent through first-party scene/material contracts
gameplayContract.ui: mirakana::ui::UiDocument HUD diagnostics through mirakana::submit_ui_renderer_submission with host-gated native GPU runtime UI overlay output for box sprites and cooked texture/atlas-backed image sprites whose UiRendererImagePalette bindings are built from first-party UI atlas package metadata; production text/font/image/atlas/accessibility remains unsupported; source image decoding and production atlas packing remain unsupported
gameplayContract.renderer: mirakana::IRenderer from the desktop host with deterministic NullRenderer fallback
gameplayContract.currentRuntime: host-gated 3D desktop package foundation with cooked skinned mesh scene (GameEngine.CookedSkinnedMesh.v1), material instance intent, camera/controller movement, HUD diagnostics, cooked package validation, host-owned D3D12 scene GPU binding including GPU skinning upload and joint palette descriptor binds, strict Vulkan gated scene GPU binding, depth-aware postprocess, fixed 3x3 PCF directional shadow smoke, native GPU runtime UI overlay for first-party box sprites, cooked UI atlas package metadata that builds textured UI sprite atlas image bindings, and a package-visible renderer quality gate over existing scene GPU/postprocess/depth/shadow/framegraph counters through `--require-renderer-quality-gates` and `renderer_quality_status=ready`; runtime source asset parsing remains unsupported; source image decoding remains unsupported; production atlas packing remains unsupported; material graph remains unsupported; skeletal animation production path remains unsupported; GPU skinning is host-proven on the D3D12 package smoke lane via `sample_desktop_runtime_game --require-gpu-skinning`; package streaming remains unsupported; production text/font/accessibility remains unsupported; public native or RHI handle access remains unsupported; general production renderer quality remains unsupported

backendReadiness.graphics: host-gated D3D12 primary Windows package proof and strict Vulkan host/toolchain/runtime gated proof with cooked skinned mesh (GameEngine.CookedSkinnedMesh.v1), material instance intent, primary camera metadata, depth-aware framegraph postprocess, sample fixed 3x3 PCF directional shadow filtering, renderer-owned native GPU runtime UI overlay, cooked UI atlas package metadata for texture/atlas-backed UI image sprite proof, and package-visible renderer quality gate diagnostics; strict package smoke expects directional_shadow_status=ready, directional_shadow_ready=1, directional_shadow_filter_mode=fixed_pcf_3x3, directional_shadow_filter_taps=9, directional_shadow_filter_radius_texels=1, renderer_quality_status=ready, renderer_quality_ready=1, renderer_quality_diagnostics=0, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_passes=3, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps=5, renderer_quality_framegraph_passes_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, positive ui_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_overlay_draws, ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, positive ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds/ui_texture_overlay_draws, framegraph_passes=3, framegraph_passes_executed=6, framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=10, positive renderer_gpu_skinning_draws and renderer_skinned_palette_descriptor_binds when `--require-gpu-skinning` is enabled, and positive scene_gpu_skinned_mesh_* counters; material graph remains unsupported; skeletal animation production path remains unsupported; package streaming remains unsupported; public native or RHI handle access remains unsupported; general production renderer quality remains unsupported; Metal ready remains unsupported
backendReadiness.ui: mirakana_ui HUD diagnostics over renderer submission counters plus host-gated native GPU runtime UI overlay for colored boxes and cooked package-metadata-driven texture/atlas-backed image sprite submissions; production text/font/image/atlas/accessibility remains unsupported; source image decoding and production atlas packing remain unsupported
